valid.name: allowed-restrict-only
valid.code:
ALTER TABLE child ADD FOREIGN KEY (parent_id) REFERENCES parent (id) ON DELETE RESTRICT;
ALTER TABLE child2 ADD FOREIGN KEY (parent_id) REFERENCES parent (id) ON DELETE NO ACTION;

valid.name: explicit-actions

invalid.name: allowed-disallows-cascade
invalid.code: ALTER TABLE child ADD FOREIGN KEY (parent_id) REFERENCES parent (id) ON DELETE CASCADE;

errors.message: `ON DELETE CASCADE` is not in the `allowed` list (RESTRICT, NO ACTION). Either change the action or extend the rule's `allowed` option.

invalid.name: missing-on-delete

errors.message: Foreign-key constraint is missing an explicit `ON DELETE` clause; the implicit default is `NO ACTION`. Make the choice explicit so reviewers can see what happens to dependent rows.
Foreign-key constraint is missing an explicit `ON DELETE` clause; the implicit default is `NO ACTION`. Make the choice explicit so reviewers can see what happens to dependent rows.
